# نظرة (Nazra ERP)

> نظام ERP عربي متكامل لإدارة العملاء والمبيعات والمخزون والمحاسبة، يعمل بدون إنترنت ويدعم تعدد الشركات.

Nazra is an Arabic-first, RTL ERP platform for small and mid-sized businesses. It covers customer management, sales (quotes → orders → invoices), payments, inventory, suppliers, purchase cycle (PO → goods receipt → purchase invoice), credit notes, double-entry accounting, and reporting. The app is offline-capable (PWA) and multi-tenant.

## Pages

- [Landing](/landing): Product overview, features, and pricing.
- [Sign in / Sign up](/auth): Authentication for existing and new users.

## Optional

- [Published app](https://erpsmartarabic1.lovable.app/): Live deployment.
